caption: A woman with blonde hair tied in a bun stands behind a podium in a formal setting against a plain white background. She is wearing a black blazer over a red shirt. In the upper left of the scene, the logo "mediasite" is visible. A thin microphone and a clear plastic water bottle are positioned on the podium in front of her. Throughout the sequence, the woman gestures with her hands while speaking. She begins by raising her right hand high in the air. She then lowers her right arm, extending her fingers forward in a gesturing motion. As the sequence continues, she lowers her right hand further toward the podium, and finally, she brings both hands together in front of her waist, clasped together. Her gaze shifts slightly as she speaks, looking toward the left side of the frame.
